name: nouns-web-prototype
description: Local browser prototype that renders authentic Nouns using the official CC0 asset set.

scripts.start: npm run build && wrangler pages dev public
scripts.cf:dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev public
scripts.cf:project: wrangler pages project create industrynext-nouns --production-branch main
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy public --project-name industrynext-nouns
